pages.text: It truly feels like a frenzied legion firing gunpowder assaults against your oral mucosa and tongue!$(br)This agitation combined with sugar-fueled energy makes you crave physical exertion.$(br)Grants consumer:$(br)$(li)2-minute 30-second Surge$(li)2-minute Swiftness$(li)2-minute 30-second Strength$(br)Can be consumed regardless of satiation. Buff durations are cumulative.
